ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Continued To Jul-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Sally Bergman, Esq., for and with Sharon Lee, Administrator.

At the outset, counsel reports as to why she failed to appear at the last calling. The court advises that it does not find good cause for the failure to appear and orders counsel to pay sanctions in the amount of $250.

Counsel reports as to the status of the Estate and believes that a Petition for Final Distribution may be filed soon. The court and counsel discuss and confirm a continuance date.

The Order to Show Cause and Order to Appear are taken off calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-29-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The court instructs counsel to file a petition by Jul-15-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Chwin. Not Reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (5132 Cox Drive, Valley Springs, Ca 95252)
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sally Bergman for Sharon Lee, Petitioner (via Zoom).

Ms. Bergman provided to the court a copy of an updated appraisal, which matched the sale price of the property at $35,500. No overbids were received or anticipated.

The sale was confirmed at $35,500 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. The bond of $191,000 was confirmed as already in place. The court approved the extension of the agent's contract for either 30 days or until the close of escrow, whichever is later. Order signed in open court.

Petition For Relief Under Probate Code 850 Et Seq, Including Recoverof Estate Real And Personal Property Wrongfully Held By Respondents, Compensation For Wrongfully Withholding Property, Double Damages, Attorneys? Fees And Costs And For Ejectment From Estate Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-27-2023 Continued To Aug-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sally Bergman, Esq, counsel for Sharon Lee, Administrator with Will annexed (appearing by video conference)

Ms. Bergman reports on the status of the settlement with the tenants of the estate real property. She reports that while the settlement remains in place, she has learned that Sheldon Fong has been placed under conservatorship in Orange County. She has been in contact with the attorney for the Conservator and has some degree of confidence that the Conservator will be accepting service of notice of the pending Probate Code Sec. 850 Petition and that the matter will move forward within the next 45 days.

At the Court's query, Ms. Bergman advises that she attempted to file Form DE-115 but the same was rejected for filing for reasons unknown.

After further discussion, the Court continues the matter to August 15, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Gomez. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections and the matter being properly noticed, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated November 10, 1997 is admitted to probate. Sharon Lee is appointed as the Administrator with Will Annexed with limited authority. Bond is set at $191,000.00. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by August 15, 2021, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
